ItacPersonItem.Notes: Dates according to Archiginnasio on-line catalogue; Nickname from Claire Pace `"Perfected through emulation": Imprese of the Academia degl`Incamminati` in Notizie da Palazzo Albani: rivista quadrimestrale di storia dell`arte 33 (2004) pp. 99-137. For his second nickname See Poesie nel felice ingresso di … Andrea Erba nell`Almo Collegio di Mont`alto Bologna 1616; on him as an engraver See Veronika Birke Italian Masters of the Sixteenth and Seventeenth Century 1987.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
